A

Supported activation functions.
App - Class in com.dl4j.starter
Hello world!

B

BATCH_NORM - Enum constant in enum class com.ai.dl4j.properties.LayerType
Batch normalization layer used to stabilize and accelerate training by normalizing activations.
build(Dl4jProperties) - Static method in class com.ai.dl4j.factory.Dl4jModelFactory
Builds and initializes a MultiLayerNetwork from the provided configuration.

CONVOLUTION - Enum constant in enum class com.ai.dl4j.properties.LayerType
Convolutional layer used primarily for image or spatial data processing.

D

DemoApplication - Class in com.dl4j.demo
 
DemoApplication() - Constructor for class com.dl4j.demo.DemoApplication
 
DemoController - Class in com.dl4j.demo
 
DemoController() - Constructor for class com.dl4j.demo.DemoController
 
DENSE - Enum constant in enum class com.ai.dl4j.properties.LayerType
Fully connected (dense) layer where each neuron is connected to all outputs of the previous layer.
Dl4jAutoConfiguration - Class in com.ai.dl4j.config
 
Dl4jAutoConfiguration() - Constructor for class com.ai.dl4j.config.Dl4jAutoConfiguration
 
Dl4jController - Class in com.ai.dl4j.web
REST controller exposing endpoints for interacting with a DL4J (DeepLearning4J) model service.
Dl4jController() - Constructor for class com.ai.dl4j.web.Dl4jController
 
Dl4jModelFactory - Class in com.ai.dl4j.factory
Factory class responsible for building a DeepLearning4J MultiLayerNetwork based on a declarative configuration object (Dl4jProperties).
Dl4jModelFactory() - Constructor for class com.ai.dl4j.factory.Dl4jModelFactory
 
dl4jModelService(Dl4jProperties, MultiLayerNetwork) - Method in class com.ai.dl4j.config.Dl4jAutoConfiguration
Provides the main service for interacting with the DL4J model.
Dl4jModelService - Class in com.ai.dl4j.service
Core service responsible for managing the DL4J model lifecycle.
Dl4jModelService() - Constructor for class com.ai.dl4j.service.Dl4jModelService
 
Dl4jProperties - Class in com.ai.dl4j.properties
Root configuration properties for DL4J integration.
Dl4jProperties() - Constructor for class com.ai.dl4j.properties.Dl4jProperties
 
DROPOUT - Enum constant in enum class com.ai.dl4j.properties.LayerType
Dropout layer used for regularization by randomly disabling neurons during training.

H

health() - Method in class com.ai.dl4j.web.Dl4jController
Simple health check endpoint to verify that the DL4J service is running.
health() - Method in class com.dl4j.demo.DemoController
Health check endpoint.

I

IDENTITY - Enum constant in enum class com.ai.dl4j.properties.ActivationType
Identity (no activation)

L

LayerProperties - Class in com.ai.dl4j.properties
Configuration for a single neural network layer.
LayerProperties() - Constructor for class com.ai.dl4j.properties.LayerProperties
 
LayerType - Enum Class in com.ai.dl4j.properties
Supported neural network layer types used in model configuration.
load(String) - Method in class com.ai.dl4j.service.Dl4jModelService
Loads a previously saved DL4J model from disk.
load(String) - Method in class com.ai.dl4j.web.Dl4jController
Loads a previously saved model from disk.
load(String) - Method in class com.dl4j.demo.DemoController
Loads model from disk.
LossType - Enum Class in com.ai.dl4j.properties
Supported loss functions for training.
LSTM - Enum constant in enum class com.ai.dl4j.properties.LayerType
Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM) recurrent layer for sequence modeling.

MSE - Enum constant in enum class com.ai.dl4j.properties.LossType
Mean Squared Error

Creates the DL4J MultiLayerNetwork based on configuration properties.

O

OUTPUT - Enum constant in enum class com.ai.dl4j.properties.LayerType
Output layer used for producing final predictions.

P

predict(double[]) - Method in class com.ai.dl4j.service.Dl4jModelService
Performs inference on a single input sample.
predict(double[]) - Method in class com.ai.dl4j.web.Dl4jController
Runs inference on the trained model using the provided input vector.
predict(double[]) - Method in class com.dl4j.demo.DemoController
Performs prediction.

R

RELU - Enum constant in enum class com.ai.dl4j.properties.ActivationType
Rectified Linear Unit

S

save(String) - Method in class com.ai.dl4j.service.Dl4jModelService
Saves the current model state to disk.
save(String) - Method in class com.ai.dl4j.web.Dl4jController
Saves the current trained model to disk.
save(String) - Method in class com.dl4j.demo.DemoController
Saves model to disk.
SIGMOID - Enum constant in enum class com.ai.dl4j.properties.ActivationType
Sigmoid activation

TANH - Enum constant in enum class com.ai.dl4j.properties.ActivationType

Trains the model using randomly generated synthetic data.

Triggers model training using the underlying service.
train() - Method in class com.dl4j.demo.DemoController
Triggers model training.
